code.TOOL_CONFIRMATION_UNAVAILABLE: needs your permission, which isn't built yet
code.TOOL_CONFIRM_NO_UI: there was no window open to ask
code.TOOL_DANGEROUS_DISABLED: risky tools are switched off in your config
code.PATH_OUTSIDE_SANDBOX: that path is outside the folders you allow
code.IS_A_DIRECTORY: that's a folder, not a file
code.NOT_A_DIRECTORY: that's a file, not a folder
code.FILE_TOO_LARGE: that file is too big to read
code.COMMAND_TIMEOUT: it ran too long and was stopped
code.URL_INVALID: that isn't a valid web address
code.URL_SCHEME_BLOCKED: only http and https addresses are allowed
code.URL_BLOCKED: that address points inside your own network, so it's blocked
code.FETCH_TIMEOUT: the page took too long to load

confirm.title: Let Jarvis use {{name}}?
confirm.body: Jarvis asked to do this. Nothing runs until you allow it.
confirm.taintReason: Heads up — this follows content Jarvis read from
confirm.sessionHint: Runs this exact action without asking again until Jarvis restarts. Anything different still asks.
confirm.speakPrompt: I need your OK — check the window.

conversation.busyElsewhere: Jarvis is still replying in another chat.

model.label: Model
model.whyAuto: Auto-selected for this machine: {{ram}}GB RAM, so models up to about {{budget}}B parameters. Larger ones will run, slowly.
model.whyConfigured: Set in your config file. This machine has {{ram}}GB RAM, comfortable up to about {{budget}}B parameters.

tools.optin: Tools are off for this model: nobody has measured whether it can decline one, and a model that runs tools it shouldn't is a security problem, not just a noisy one.
tools.unsupported: This model can't use tools at all — its chat template has no support for them.

readiness.title: Jarvis isn't ready yet

code.OLLAMA_UNREACHABLE: Can't reach Ollama — it needs to be installed and running before Jarvis can think.
code.NO_MODELS: Ollama is running but has no models. Pull one to get started.
code.MODEL_NOT_FOUND: The model in your config ({{model}}) isn't installed.
code.VOICE_MODELS_MISSING: Voice models aren't downloaded, so speech is off. Typing still works.
code.WAKE_MODELS_MISSING: Wake-word models aren't downloaded, so “Hey Jarvis” is off.
code.NO_INPUT_DEVICE: No microphone found. Typing still works.
code.AUDIO_RUNTIME_MISSING: The audio system isn't available, so voice is off. Typing still works.
code.TOOLS_OPTIN: Tools are off for this model — it hasn't been checked for whether it can decline one. Chat works normally.
code.TOOLS_UNSUPPORTED: This model can't use tools. Chat works normally.
code.TOOLS_DISABLED: Tools are switched off in this build.

readiness.micPermissionNote: If Jarvis never hears you, check System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.

wake.label: “Hey Jarvis”
wake.enable: Enable the always-on wake word (keeps the microphone open)
wake.disable: Disable the wake word (closes the microphone)

hint.no_speech: Didn't catch anything — press the mic and try again.

error.OLLAMA_UNREACHABLE: Can't reach Ollama. Is it running?
error.NO_MODELS: No models installed yet. Run: ollama pull llama3.2:3b
error.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: Backend not running. In dev: start it and set VITE_JARVIS_PORT / VITE_JARVIS_TOKEN.
error.VOICE_UNAVAILABLE: Voice isn't available in this build.
error.STT_RUNTIME_MISSING: Speech recognition isn't installed in this build.
error.TTS_RUNTIME_MISSING: Speech synthesis isn't installed in this build.
error.VAD_RUNTIME_MISSING: Voice detection isn't installed in this build.
error.MIC_UNAVAILABLE: Can't open the microphone. Check system permissions.
error.WAKE_UNAVAILABLE: Wake word isn't available — fetch the wake models first.
error.WAKE_RUNTIME_MISSING: Wake-word detection isn't installed in this build.
